About me

I make complex programs feel manageable.

I'm a Technical Program Manager who thrives at the intersection of technology and people. I've spent the last 8 years working across engineering, product, and ops teams to ship large-scale programs on time and on budget.

I believe the best TPMs are translators. They turn technical complexity into business clarity. My superpower is my ability to connect with cross functional teams, maintaining alignment on business objectives and driving progress toward shared goals.

Outside of the office, you will find me at the gym, hiking, running (slowly), planning my next trip to the mountains, reading about the latest developments in AI, or debating what show to binge watch next.

Experience

Where I've made an impact

Technical Program Manager | Solutions Architect Jan 2021 – Present

Bringg · Chicago, IL

I ran the programs that kept Bringg's product moving by coordinating engineers, product managers, and customer teams to ship platform improvements on time. I also built internal tools using AI that gave leadership real visibility into how the business was performing, which helped the professional services team go from losing money to breaking even. When processes were broken or slowing things down, I fixed them.

▪ Coordinated end-to-end program alignment across product management, core engineering, customer success, and marketing teams to design and deploy unified platform experiences for enterprise clients.

▪ Successfully shipped 30+ core product enhancements centered around high-volume user experiences, data synchronization, and technical backend infrastructure while managing shifting engineering priorities in a fast-paced environment.

▪ Formulated technical specifications, API structures, and JSON data mapping documentation to integrate complex third-party data streams cleanly into core logistics platforms.

▪ Steered multi-department initiatives to resolve conflicting workstream priorities, maintaining high quality and reliability while driving a 12-point improvement in internal team NPS scores.

▪ Leveraged AI to build automated executive reporting that enabled a shift to a P&L model, unlocking pricing optimization and hours-consumption visibility that moved Professional Services from a cost center to break-even in 2025, on track for profitability in 2026.

▪ Designed and implemented an org-wide project tracking system that standardized data integrity for AI insights, enabled cross-team visibility, and cut average implementation time from 9 to 6 weeks (small projects) and 6 to 3 months (enterprise).

▪ Built a centralized product documentation system as the single source of truth for launches, aligning Sales, Marketing, CSMs, Product, and Implementation on functionality and upsell process, reducing related inquiries by 80%+.

▪ Drove a 20% increase in team AI adoption within the first month of completing an AI Technical Diploma, achieving full team utilization through structured 1:1 coaching and workflow integration sessions.
